body:
## Summary
- Adds the current audio setting to the Profile study setup card so the card summarizes daily goal, language, and audio state.
- Replaces the generic settings button copy with a localized CTA for adjusting goal, language, and audio.
- Tightens the profile copy/content guard for the new card contract, localized badge fields, paywall fail-closed checks, and current PremiumBanner accessibility-state formatting.

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-profile-route-copy-parity.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:a11y-labels`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:theme-discipline`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `rm -rf dist-web && NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- Profile web smoke against `dist-web` with system Chrome: `/profile` renders `Studieinställningar`, `Ändra mål, språk och ljud`, and the audio badge.

## Note
- The broader `scripts/ui-effects.test.js` suite is red on the current base with unrelated stale source-expectation failures; the profile-specific parity test in the same combined run passed.
title: [codex] profile: complete study setup shortcut
